data.biography:
Austin Rhodes Is an American actor and Model. Austin honed his skills in Atlanta Georgia, Orlando, and Tampa Florida. While living in Florida Austin studied Multiple types of acting classes and stunt training to develop different techniques to help build his craft. He worked not only in front but also behind the camera on Indie films, features, and TV shows.

Prior to working professionally as an actor, Austin trained over a decade as a Martial-Art instructor of Capoeira and BJJ. Austin enlisted in the Marines as an Infantry Rifleman. He would later move to Maryland and continue to serve as an Executive Protection Officer carrying out his duties while maintaining a safe environment during higher echelon town hall meetings, and maintaining protection for undisputed lightweight boxing champion Gervonte Davis and others. Austin then moved to Florida to compete as a Classic Physique Competitor where he would win his second show giving him the opportunity to compete as a national competitor.

When not acting, Austin continues to lift weights and train Martial-Arts. He helps others reach their goals with diet, and workout plans.
data.name: Austin J. Rhodes

data.biography:
Film Rachanun Mahawan is a Thai actress under GMMTV. In 2022, she graduated with a bachelor's degree from the School of Architecture and Design at the King Mongkut's University of Technology Thonburi.

Film started in the entertainment industry in 2019 when she became one of the two winners of the Clean & Clear's and GMMTV's star search competition "Go On Girl & Guy Star Search 2019". She made her acting debut in 2019 with a guest role in the series "Dark Blue Kiss".
data.name: Rachanun Mahawan
รชานันท์ มหาวรรณ์

data.biography: Yerra Raghu, known professionally as Raghu Babu, is a Telugu comedian well known for his comic expressions and timing. He has worked in many successful films in Telugu industry. He is the eldest son of famous comedian and character actor Giri Babu.
data.name: Raghu Babu

data.biography: Kenji Takahashi, known professionally as Kenji Ohba is a prolific Japanese actor and former stuntman best known for his roles in the Super Sentai and Metal Heroes series, especially as Retsu Ichijouji / Gavan in the 1982 TV series Space Sheriff Gavan. He is the president of his own action/stunt troupe called "Luck JET" ("JET" being an acronym for "Jaunty Eventful Troupe"). [Wikipedia]
data.name: Kenji Ohba

data.biography: 白雪岑，又名白杺瓒，原名白雪，演员、配音演员。毕业于北京电影学院高职配音班，师从资深配音演员徐燕。现居北京。嗓音轻柔纯净，擅长演绎温柔可人的女性角色。代表作电视剧《雪山飞狐》程灵素、《鹿鼎记》阿珂，游戏《仙剑奇侠传》系列柳梦璃、凌波等。
data.name: 白雪岑

data.biography: 白雪岑，又名白杺瓚，原名白雪，演員、配音演員。畢業於北京電影學院高職配音班，師從資深配音演員徐燕。現居北京。嗓音輕柔純淨，擅長演繹温柔可人的女性角色。代表作電視劇《雪山飛狐》程靈素、《鹿鼎記》阿珂，遊戲《仙劍奇俠傳》系列柳夢璃、淩波等。
data.name: 白雪岑

data.biography: Marie Miyake (三宅 麻理恵, Miyake Marie, June 7, 1985) is a Japanese voice actress (seiyū) from Osaka Prefecture. She is affiliated with Raccoon Dog. She was previously affiliated with Pro Fit. She has blood type O and is 162 cm tall.
data.name: Marie Miyake

data.biography: Marie Miyake (三宅 麻理恵, Miyake Marie, 7 de junio de 1985) es una actriz de voz (seiyū) japonesa de la prefectura de Osaka. Está afiliada a Raccoon Dog. Anteriormente estuvo afiliada a Pro Fit. Tiene grupo sanguíneo O y mide 162 cm.
data.name: Marie Miyake

data.biography:
Byungchan (병찬), also referred to by his full name Choi Byungchan, is a South Korean singer under Play M Entertainment. He is a member of the boy group VICTON.

In May 2019, he, alongside Seungwoo, became a contestant on the competition show Produce X 101. However, on July 11, it was announced he would be leaving the show due to health issues.
data.name: Choi Byung-chan

data.biography: 韩国男歌手、舞者和演员，在韩国男子团体VICTON内担任副唱。2016年11月9日，透过首张迷你专辑《Voice To New World》，以主打歌《I'm fine》出道，曾参加大热选秀《Produce X 101》，因腿伤中途退赛。2020年，通过JTBC迷你剧《Live》作为演员出道。
data.name: 崔秉灿

data.biography: 韓國男歌手、舞者和演員，在韓國男子團體 VICTON 內擔任副唱。2016 年 11 月 9 日，透過首張迷你專輯《Voice To New World》，以主打歌《I'm fine》出道，曾參加大熱選秀《Produce X 101》，因腿傷中途退賽。2020 年，通過 JTBC 迷你劇《Live》作為演員出道。
data.name: 崔秉燦
Đấu Phá Thương Khung
data.overview: Phim Đấu Phá Thương Khung: Chuyển thể từ tiểu thuyết cùng tên của tác giả Thiên Tàm Thổ Đậu.  Tiêu Viêm là thiên tài tu luyện đấu khí của nhà họ Tiêu, 11 tuổi đã đột phá Thập Đoạn Đấu Chi Khí, trở thành đấu thủ trẻ tuổi nhất của gia tộc suốt trăm năm qua. Nhưng đến năm 12 tuổi, Tiêu Viêm bất ngờ mất đi khả năng tu luyện, chỉ còn lại Tam Đoạn Đấu Chi Khí. Trong 3 năm sau đó, nhà họ Tiêu cũng liên tiếp gặp nhiều bất trắc.  Đúng vào lúc Tiêu Viêm tuyệt vọng nhất, một linh hồn xuất hiện từ trong chiếc nhẫn trên tay Tiêu Viêm, mở ra trước mắt Tiêu Viêm một cánh cửa hoàn toàn mới. Dưới sự giúp đỡ của Dược lão, Tiêu Viêm đã hồi phục và nâng cao được công lực của mình, đánh bại Nạp Lan Yên Nhiên khi giao hẹn ba năm đến.  Nhưng không may là cha Tiêu Viêm lại bị Vân Lam tông bắt đi, Tiêu Viêm lại bắt đầu cuộc hành trình nhiều thử thách nhằm cứu thoát cha mình…
